strategy: He is Death, so attack with Life; no resist is listed, so Life boosts land well.
Minimize blades: every blade you cast makes him Berserk, ramping his damage. Use traps and Feint for setup instead, or blade and hit the same round.
When you hit him he Steal-Heals off his ally Brulee Sucre and Brulee shields itself with Spirit Armor, so focus him down rather than the ally so his heals dry up.
He self-buffs with Dark Pact every 3 rounds, so shield for his bigger hits.
Stack traps and a Feint, then land a big Life hit while keeping blades minimal to avoid the Berserk.
cheatNotes: Whenever he is hit he Steal-Heals from his ally Brulee Sucre, so take Brulee out of the equation or just burst him.
Being hit also makes Brulee shield itself with Spirit Armor.
Every 3 rounds he casts Dark Pact to buff himself, so expect a bigger hit and shield.
Every 3 rounds Brulee casts Guidance, an accuracy buff, on his side.
Every blade you cast triggers Berserk on him, raising his damage. Set up with traps instead, or blade the same round you hit.
